content.en:
Time flies.

In the blink of an eye, another eternal epoch has passed.

On this day, a big thing happened in the True Saintless Land, that is, the Lord of the Word took control of the space.

At this time, the Lord of the Word of Darkness completely controlled space and time, and he could step into the realm of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord at any time.

Next, the Lord of the Immortal only needs to become the incarnation of space again like the Lord of the Legendary Realm, and he can completely cause a transformation and become the Lord of the Peak Legendary Realm.

And there is not much danger in attacking the peak Legendary Realm Lord, even if he fails, he can still attack again after resting for a period of time.

Under normal circumstances, no one would stop a Legendary Realm Lord from attacking the peak Legendary Realm Lord, unless there is a life and death feud, and they don't want the other party to break through and take the opportunity to bombard the other party.

However, ordinary Legendary Realm Lords can't beat the Legendary Realm Lords who are about to break through, and they must be the peak Legendary Realm Lords, and they will be killed long ago if they want to kill, and they won't wait until the other party is about to break through.

As a result, there have been no instances of failed breaches in the Void Zone.

There is no holy place.

One by one, the Lords of the Legendary Realm were on guard, and the Lords of the Word entered the empty sea, ready to break through.

In the empty sea, the Lord of the Word gradually became one with space, becoming the embodiment of space, the master of space

A certain moment.

The metamorphosis begins!

Bang!!!!

Countless spatial origin forces and time origin powers poured into the Stygian Lord's body, prompting her to complete her final promotion.

Her strength is also getting stronger and stronger, completely surpassing ordinary Legendary Realm Lords.

Ten times over!

Hundredfold!

......

Unconsciously, the strength of the Lord of the Word had increased hundreds of times.

At this point, she could easily wipe out an ordinary Legendary Realm Lord.

This is the strength of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, and it is also a Peak Legendary Realm Lord, you can imagine how terrifying those powerhouses who have cultivated countless eternal epochs at the Peak Legendary Realm Lord level.

Ordinary Legendary Realm Lords are really like ants to these peak Legendary Realm Lords.

"Breakthrough 'Fight!

The Lord of the Word was thrilled.

When he reached the peak Legendary Realm Lord level, he realized how powerful he was now, this was the real peak, ranking at the top level of the Void Region.

When the Five Left Immortal Lords broke through, many Legendary Realm Lords of the Infinite Sea were shocked.

"What, the Lord of the Word has broken through?

The Blackwater Lord was shocked.

He never expected that the True Saintless Land would give birth to a Legendary Realm Lord, how could he take revenge?

"It's not good, I have to take refuge in the Lord of the Legendary Realm, otherwise there is really no holy land to kill me, and I won't be able to live. "

The Lord of Blackwater immediately went to Lord Wuheng.

There is no eternal holy land.

The first holy land of the Infinite Sea, and the most powerful force, is the force built by the Lord of Impermanence.

There is no eternal holy land, and there is no eternal mountain.

The Lord of Blackwater came to take refuge.

"The Lord of Blackwater has come to join the Lord of Impermanence, and is willing to join the Holy Land of Impermanence. "

Blackwater Lord said.

Rumble!!!!

Lord Wuheng appeared, looked at Lord Blackwater, and said with some surprise: "Lord Wuheng, you want to join my Wuheng Holy Land, interesting, why do you suddenly have this idea?"

The Immortal Holy Land can't help the Blackwater Lord, and there's no way to help it break through.

When it comes to the level of the Black Water Lord, he can almost only rely on himself.

The Lord of the Black Water said helplessly: "The three thousand kites of the True Saintless Land were originally my things, but they were stolen by the True Saintless Land, and now the True Nothing Holy Land has given birth to a peak Legendary Realm Lord. "

"Three thousand kites are yours?"

Lord Impermanence understood.

He pondered for a moment and said, "What good is it for me for you to join the Immortal Holy Land, I can completely disapprove of you. After all, ordinary pinnacle Legendary Realm lords didn't do me any help. "

The Lord of Blackwater immediately said, "Lord Wuheng, I am willing to be loyal to you forever and become your subordinate. "

"Oh, really?"

Lord Wuheng became interested.

It is an honor for a powerful Legendary Realm Lord to be willing to become his subordinate, after all, at this level, there is no need to be loyal to the enemy, and Legendary Realm Lords like the Lord of the Shaking Mountain are too rare.

And he is not a peak Legendary Realm Lord like the Whitebearded Old Man, and he is not qualified to attract such a Legendary Realm Lord to be loyal to him.

Even some Legendary Realm Lords of the Wuheng Territory will not be loyal to him, everyone can only be regarded as a Legendary Realm Lord of one force, some words will be listened to, but some words can be opposed.

Allegiance, on the other hand, is to listen to everything and not to disobey commands, as a servant.

"'You're good, then you will be a Legendary Realm Lord of the Imperpetual Territory from now on, and you will only obey my orders."

Lord Impermanence announced.

"Thank you, Lord Wuheng. Lord Blackwater said gratefully.

Although he accepted one of his subordinates, the Lord of Impermanence was still not very happy, because the Infinite Sea had one more Peak Legendary Realm Lord, and the True Immortal Holy Land was qualified to compete with the Imperpetual Holy Land.

Moreover, he had also sent someone to suppress the True No Holy Land before, and this matter could not be hidden.

Now, I am afraid that the True Unholy Land will be dissatisfied with the Impermanence Holy Land, and the two sides have been completely opposed.

In the past, he would not take the true unholy land in his eyes, but now, the other party no longer cares about him.

"It seems that the True Saintless Land has obtained a great opportunity by shuttling through the timeline with the help of the Kirin Lin, otherwise it would not have been such a coincidence that a peak Legendary Realm Lord was born. "Lord Wuheng said secretly.

Hateful.

If he had entered the Iris Lin and traveled through the timeline, his strength would inevitably have soared, and he would not be at the bottom of the peak Legend Realm (King Hao) times

And all this was ruined by the True Unholy Land!

"Damn it, I should have destroyed you in disregard of your reputation, but I was merciful and gave you a chance to grow!!"

Lord Wuheng was extremely remorseful, but it was too late to repent.

He could easily wipe out a group of Legendary Realm Lords, but he couldn't wipe out a peak Legendary Realm Lord.

It can be said that if the Lord of the Word does not die, he cannot destroy the True Saintless Land.

At this time, the True Immortal Land was filled with laughter, and they were holding a huge event to celebrate the Immortal Lord's breakthrough to the peak Legendary Realm Lord.

Many Legendary Realm Lords who were friendly with the True Saintless Land came to visit one by one, and many other forces were also sent to congratulate them

After all, anyone can see that the True Void Holy Land has completely risen now, sweeping away the trend of declining the Holy Land, and has become one of the top forces in the Void Region. _
